Split solutions
Learn more
Another step in the company’s development: Ekoenergetyka introduces Axon Charger – a new product brand
Ekoenergetyka announces the launch of a new product brand – Axon Charger.
This is a natural stage in the company’s development, resulting from many years of experience and the growing needs of the e-mobility market. The new brand does not replace Ekoenergetyka – it serves as its product voice and modern face, focusing on the elements that truly shape charging infrastructure.
Learn more
Smart charging for
everyday mobility
Innovative charging stations designed for convenience, advanced technology, and growing demand.
Ekoenergetyka’s fast charging stations offer cutting-edge technology and driver's comfort, ensuring fast and safe charging. From large hubs to individual points, our chargers are intuitive, reliable, and scalable, meeting the increasing demand for electromobility and supporting the future of electric vehicle infrastructure.
Learn more
High-power solutions
for commercial fleets
Future-ready, reliable charging solutions designed to support the growing electric truck industry.
Ekoenergetyka’s E-Truck charging stations deliver fast, high-power solutions for the transportation sector. Engineered with advanced technology and Megawatt Charging readiness, our stations offer scalability and efficiency. Designed for ease of use and driver comfort, they support the growth of electric truck infrastructure.
Learn more
Charging cities and public transport
Scalable and reliable charging solutions designed to drive the future of urban mobility.
Ekoenergetyka leads the way in E-Bus charging, with some of Europe’s largest systems. Our tailored solutions streamline public transport, supporting cities and operators with efficient infrastructure. Committed to innovation, we shape scalable urban mobility and meet the evolving demands of global public transport.
Learn more

stations

About us
More than a charger
At Ekoenergetyka, we are shaping the future of e-mobility with innovative charging solutions. Driven by a commitment to quality, sustainability, and cutting-edge technology, we offer much more than just DC chargers. Discover Ekoenergetyka and learn more about our solutions for You and your needs.
Learn more
Service
Comprehensive service solutions for high-power charging stations
Ekoenergetyka’s service solutions are designed to ensure the reliability and availability of your high-power charging infrastructure. From installation and commissioning to ongoing maintenance and remote diagnostics, we provide comprehensive support throughout the lifecycle of your stations. Our 24/7 Monitoring Center, active supervision, and extensive network of service partners

about.text:
About us | Ekoenergetyka
Skip to content
All you need. Discover the Axon Charger by Ekoenergetyka. Learn more ->
Contact
We are cha
ging the world
About us
At Ekoenergetyka, we drive the future of e-mobility with advanced charging solutions. Committed to quality, sustainability, and innovation, we offer more than just DC chargers. Explore our solutions tailored to your needs.
More
than a charger
As an independent manufacturer, we develop proprietary technologies in-house, ensuring unmatched reliability and full control over the entire process. Choosing Ekoenergetyka chargers means exceptional aftersales support and access to the knowledge, skills, and certifications you need to succeed. Behind it all stands our diverse team of experts, driving innovation and excellence every step of the way.
Let's talk
Cutting-edge production
State-of-the-Art Manufacturing – Capacity for 20,000 units annually.
Scalable Solutions – Designed to meet growing market demands.
Exceptional aftersales technology
97% charging infrastructure uptime
Around 70 service partners across Europe
More than 300 service points ready to assist
Expert Team
A diverse team of engineers, programmers, scientists, salespeople, marketers, and production specialists.
What unites us is professionalism in our fields and a shared passion for electromobility.
Groundbreaking technology
4 R&D Centers – driving innovation in e-mobility
In-House Development – From concept to delivery
Ultimate charger
Reliable All-in-one series - Axon Easy. The most universal chargers, our bestsellers. The unmatched split solution, perfect for multistation hubs: intelligent Axon Side 360 DLBS + driver-friendly SAT 400.
Comprehensive training
Product Training – Everything you need to know about our chargers.
Certification Training – Get authorized to install and service charging stations.
Shaping the future of e-mobility with
innovative DC charging solutions
Who we are
We are pioneers and industry leaders in e-mobility, delivering cutting-edge DC charging solutions for zero-emission passenger cars, eco-friendly heavy transport, and efficient urban buses since 2009.
We design and manufacture innovative DC charging solutions that power the global transition to sustainable mobility. Driven by a commitment to quality and innovation, our diverse team has deployed chargers in more than 40 countries across 3 continents, shaping the future of e-mobility with cutting-edge technology.
We are a global, innovative, and technology-driven company based in Zielona Góra, Poland, 200 km from Berlin, in the heart of Europe.
Building a sustainable future with
zero-emission transport at its core.
Where we aim
Our
mission
Our mission is to drive the global transition toward a cleaner, more sustainable future by delivering innovative technology that empowers electric mobility. Guided by a vision to seamlessly integrate e-mobility solutions into everyday life, we aim to be a catalyst for sustainable development, shaping a world where zero-emission transport becomes the norm.
What our values are
Responsibility
Our diverse international team speaks your language – literally and figuratively. Wherever you are, we’re close, ready to understand your needs and shape the future of sustainable transport.
Comprehensive solutions
We take a holistic approach, delivering end-to-end e-mobility solutions that include innovative products and comprehensive aftersales care – service, training, and full support.
Development & innovation
We drive the growth of e-mobility and our company by creating innovative solutions that meet today’s market demands while anticipating future needs.
Close to client
Our diverse, international team speaks your language – literally and figuratively. Wherever you are, we’re nearby, ready to understand your needs and shape the future of sustainable transport together.
Independence & reliability
As an independent manufacturer, we develop proprietary technologies in-house, ensuring unmatched reliability and full

Explore our charging stations
Fast charging solutions for zero emission city vehicles. Ekoenergetyka has been developing the most effective charging systems for city buses for over 15 years. Our charging solutions are present in over 150 cities around the world. Regardless of whether you need a single charger or a comprehensive charging solution for a multi-station charging hub, the Ekoenergtyka team is ready to provide the best option for your business.
